comp.label: Comparison
comp.sub: Not all ad blockers are created equal.
comp.title: AdOff vs the others.
compare.label: Free vs Pro
compare.note: Free plan blocks banners, trackers, and popups on every site. Pro plan adds video ad blocking on streaming platforms and Stealth anti-detection that makes you invisible to anti-adblock systems.
compare.r4b: Advanced video ad blocking (SDK replacement), Pro only
compare.sub: Free blocks banners, trackers, and popups on every site. Pro adds video ad blocking and anti-adblock Stealth Mode.
compare.title: What each plan includes
cookie.text: No profiling: AdOff uses no advertising or analytics cookies. Only essential settings (like your language) and one optional cookie that remembers who invited you.
cta.title: Start now - 15 free days.
faq.a1: Yes, really. Free plan is free forever, with no time limit and no credit card. The 30 Pro days are also free: we don't ask for payment details. When they expire, if you don't upgrade to Pro, you automatically return to Free. No hidden costs, no unwanted auto-renewal.
faq.a10: AdOff is one of the best ad-blocking extensions for Chrome in 2026: it combines network-level blocking (138 rules), CSS cosmetic filtering, and a stealth anti-detection technology that bypasses anti-adblock walls. It blocks banners, pop-ups, trackers, and video ads, is far lighter than the alternatives, and is free with a 30-day Pro trial, no credit card required.
faq.a2: Yes, on every streaming platform using the IMA advertising standard. AdOff Pro replaces the ad SDK with a neutral stub: the player receives 'no ads available' and starts the video. No countdown, no mid-roll ads. Video ad blocking requires AdOff Pro, included in the 30-day free trial.
faq.a3: With Stealth Mode (included in trial and Pro plan), AdOff operates in the MAIN world and masks every trace. It spoofs JavaScript variables used to detect blockers, intercepts test fetches to ad servers, and simulates bait elements expected by sites. Result: anti-adblock systems receive no signal of an active extension. Free plan doesn't include Stealth, so aggressive sites might still detect it.
faq.a4: The Founder Lifetime is a limited launch offer: €99 once and you use AdOff Pro forever, including all future updates, on all your personal devices. No annual renewal, no surprises, Founder badge included. When the Founder seats run out, the offer is retired.
faq.a5: Yes. Zero Log Policy: AdOff collects no data on your browsing. We don't know which sites you visit, what you search, or how long you stay. Counters, whitelists, and preferences stay on your device, inside chrome.storage.local. The only server communication is Pro license validation (key + email). Code is inspectable before installation. We're GDPR compliant by design, not obligation.
faq.a7: No, it makes it faster. AdOff is ultra-lightweight (a fraction of the weight of other blockers, which are 3-8 MB) and operates asynchronously: it doesn't block Chrome's main thread. By eliminating ad requests from the network, it reduces traffic up to 23% and shortens page load times. Fewer scripts to execute means less RAM and battery used.
faq.a8: Yes, completely. AdOff is published on official channels (Chrome Web Store, Firefox Add-ons, Edge Add-ons), all with manual code review before every release. The extension doesn't read your passwords, doesn't access other extensions' data, and doesn't communicate with external servers except for Pro license validation. All required permissions are visible before installation.
faq.a9: Yes. Free: network blocking and CSS filters work on every website. Pro: video ad blocking works on streaming platforms using the IMA standard, and Stealth Mode (anti-detection) bypasses anti-adblock systems.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.q1: Is AdOff really free? Are there hidden costs?
faq.q10: What is the best extension to block ads on Chrome?
faq.q2: Does it really work for video ads?
faq.q3: How does AdOff bypass anti-adblock systems?
faq.q4: How does the Founder Lifetime work?
faq.q7: Does AdOff slow down Chrome or use lots of RAM?
faq.q8: Is it safe to install AdOff?
faq.q9: Does it work on all websites?
features.ads.benefit: → Faster pages. Less data consumed. Fewer trackers profiling you.
features.ads.desc: 138 network rules eliminate ad requests and trackers before they reach your browser. Banners, pop-ups, redirects, fingerprinting: they don't even load. You see only the content you care about.
features.ads.title: Total network-level blocking
features.cosmetic.benefit: → No more 'accept cookies' on every site. A clean screen from the first load.
features.cosmetic.desc: Cosmetic filters strip consent banners, pop-ups, overlays and sponsored sections from the DOM. They vanish as the page loads, with nothing for you to close. The reading stays yours.
features.cosmetic.title: Cookie banners and overlays, gone
features.label: The breakthrough
features.light.benefit: → Zero impact on RAM and battery. Just a few KB, a fraction of multi-MB blockers.
features.light.desc: While other blockers weigh 3-8 MB and bloat Chrome's memory, AdOff is a tiny fraction of that weight. Async filters, zero main thread blocking. You won't feel it running. You'll only feel your browser is fast again.
features.light.title: Ultra-lightweight architecture
features.privacy.benefit: → No telemetry, no profiling. Not even we know what you do.
features.privacy.desc: No data about your browsing leaves your device. Counters, whitelist and preferences stay local. The only connection to our servers is Pro license validation. GDPR by design, not by obligation.
features.privacy.title: Total privacy, zero logs
features.stealth.benefit: → Never see "disable your ad blocker" again. On any site.
features.stealth.desc: AdOff operates in the MAIN world of the browser, masking every trace: JavaScript variables, test fetches, bait elements. Anti-adblock systems can't detect it. You keep reading and watching without being stopped.
features.stealth.title: Stealth anti-detection Pro
features.sub: Free: 138 network rules and advanced CSS hiding. Pro: video ad blocking and Stealth mode that makes you invisible to anti-adblock.
features.title: Everything an ad blocker should do.
features.video.benefit: → Videos start immediately. No countdown, no mid-roll ads.
features.video.desc: AdOff replaces the ad SDK of video platforms with a neutral version. The player gets "no ads available" and starts. Works on any streaming platform that uses the IMA standard, which is almost all of them.
features.video.title: Video ads neutralized Pro
footer.desc: The invisible ad blocker with stealth anti-detection. Privacy-first, zero data collected.
founder.note.body: Hi, I'm Eros, from Sicily. I've sold keys and security my whole life. I protect homes and shops. I built AdOff alone to do the same for your data, because I don't want you (and your kids) to be the multinationals' ATM. Zero logs, no data sold: just the web as it should be.
founder.note.honest: AdOff just launched: no invented numbers, no fake reviews. I'm looking for the first real users. Try the free version and, if it works, leave an honest review on the store.
founder.note.label: A real person behind AdOff
founder.note.title: No inflated reviews. Just real work.

hero.distribution.label: Available on
hero.eyebrow: Ad blocker for Chrome that blocks ads, banners and video ads, invisible to websites
hero.headline: Browse ad-free.
hero.note: No card required · Chrome, Edge, Brave, Firefox · cancel in 1 click
hero.stores.label: Install directly from official stores
hero.sub: AdOff blocks banners, pop-ups, and trackers before they load. Pro neutralizes video ads at the source on streaming platforms. And works silently: sites don't know it exists.
how.label: The power of AdOff
how.step1.desc: Download AdOff and install it on your browser in 2 minutes. It's ultra-lightweight and requires no invasive permissions.
how.step1.title: Download free
how.step2.desc: From the first launch you get full access to all Pro features, including Stealth Mode. No limits.
how.step2.title: 15 full Pro days
how.step3.desc: After the trial, upgrade to Pro or stay with Free. Basic blocking is always free.
how.step3.title: Your choice
how.sub: No configuration. No credit card. Works immediately.
how.title: Get started in 30 seconds.
inspect.body: An ad blocker has to read the page to remove ads: that's why it asks permission to access site data. But the reading happens only on your device. Nothing leaves the browser. You don't have to take our word for it: the core code (network blocking, cosmetic filters, content script) is readable, not obfuscated. You can unpack the package and check it yourself.
inspect.label: Transparency, not promises
inspect.note: Pro license validation happens on a separate, private server: the product's protection is the source-available license (you can read and use it; don't resell it as a competing product) + the server, not code obfuscation.
inspect.title: The core code is inspectable
install.android.note.desc: On Android you need a browser that supports extensions. We recommend Kiwi Browser (free) or Firefox Android.
install.android.note.title: Mobile browser required
install.android.s1.desc: Download Kiwi Browser from Play Store. It's free and natively supports Chrome extensions.
install.android.s1.title: Install Kiwi Browser
install.android.s2.desc: Open this page in Kiwi Browser and download adoff-chrome.zip. Extract the ZIP with your file manager.
install.android.s2.title: Download AdOff
install.android.s3.desc:
In Kiwi Browser, go to chrome://extensions

Enable Developer Mode, tap Load unpacked extension (or "+(from .zip/.crx/.user.js)"), and select the extracted folder.
✅ AdOff now works on your Android device.
install.android.s3.title: Load the extension
install.brave.s1.desc:
Brave uses the same system as Chrome. Follow the same steps:

1. Extract the ZIP
2. Go to brave://extensions
3. Enable Developer Mode (top right)
4. Load unpacked extension
5. Select the folder
✅ AdOff works perfectly with Brave's built-in blocking. No conflict.
install.brave.s1.title: Same procedure as Chrome
install.chrome.s1.desc:
Find adoff-chrome.zip in Downloads.

Windows: Right-click → Extract all → Extract
Mac: Double-click the ZIP. A folder is created automatically.
Linux: Right-click → Extract here or unzip adoff-chrome.zip
⚠ Important: Don't delete the folder after installing. The browser needs to read it from disk. Put it somewhere safe (e.g., Documents).
install.chrome.s1.title: Extract the ZIP file
install.chrome.s1.warn: Important: Don't delete this folder after installing! Chrome needs the folder to stay on your computer.
install.chrome.s2.desc:
Open Chrome and type chrome://extensions in the address bar, then press Enter.

The page with all your extensions opens.
install.chrome.s2.title: Open Chrome Extensions page
install.chrome.s3.desc:
In the top right of the page, find the Developer Mode toggle.

Click it to enable it (it turns blue).
💡 If you don't see it, scroll to the top of the page.
install.chrome.s3.tip: If you don't see it, scroll to the top of the page.
install.chrome.s3.title: Enable Developer Mode
install.chrome.s4.desc:
After enabling Developer Mode, new buttons appear at the top.

Click Load unpacked extension (the first one on the left).

A window opens to choose a folder.
install.chrome.s4.title: Load the extension
install.chrome.s5.desc:
Navigate to the folder you extracted in Step 1.

Select adoff-chrome and click Select Folder (Windows/Linux) or Open (Mac).
✅ Done. AdOff is installed. You'll see the icon in Chrome's toolbar.
install.chrome.s5.ok: Done! AdOff is installed! You'll see the icon in Chrome's toolbar.
install.chrome.s5.title: Select the AdOff folder
install.chrome.s6.desc:
To keep AdOff always visible in the toolbar:

1. Click the puzzle icon in the top right (Extensions)
2. Find AdOff in the list
3. Click the pin next to AdOff

The icon is now always visible.
install.chrome.s6.title: Pin AdOff to the toolbar (recommended)
install.compare.title: What you unlock with Trial Pro
install.compat.sub: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Brave, Opera. On Windows, macOS, Linux, Android.
install.compat.title: Universal, on all browsers
install.dl.fallback.sub: For developer install/sideload, or for Safari (Mac App Store coming soon).
install.dl.fallback.toggle: Prefer manual install? Download the ZIPs →
install.dl.info: Version 3.4.6 · Compatible with Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera
install.dl.info.safari: v3.4.6 · ultra-lightweight · Mac App Store coming soon
install.dl.sub: Install with one click from your official store
install.dl.title: Step 1: Download AdOff
install.edge.s1.desc:
Like Chrome: find adoff-chrome.zip in Downloads, right-click → Extract all
⚠ Important: Keep the extracted folder on your computer. Don't delete it.
install.edge.s1.title: Extract the ZIP file
install.edge.s2.desc: Type in the address bar: edge://extensions and press Enter.
install.edge.s2.title: Open Edge Extensions
install.edge.s3.desc: In the bottom left of the page, enable Developer Mode.
install.edge.s3.title: Enable Developer Mode
install.edge.s4.desc: Click Load unpacked extension and select the extracted adoff-chrome folder.
install.edge.s4.title: Load the extension
install.edge.s5.ok: AdOff is installed on Edge. It works identically to Chrome.
install.edge.s5.title: Done
install.faq.a1: Yes. The browser reads the extension files from the folder. If you delete it, the extension stops working. Put it somewhere safe (e.g., Documents).
install.faq.a2: Yes, completely safe. Developer Mode just lets you install extensions from a folder instead of the store. It doesn't change anything else in your browser.
install.faq.a3: Some browsers show a warning on startup when you have manually installed extensions. Just close the warning. The extension keeps working normally. When AdOff gets to the official store, this warning disappears.
install.faq.a4: Download the new version from the site, extract the ZIP in the same folder (overwrite the files), then go to the extensions page in your browser and click the refresh arrow on AdOff.
install.faq.a5: Yes. AdOff blocks ads on all websites: video platforms, social media, news, blogs, any site. You can also pause blocking on specific sites if needed.
install.faq.a6: Go to your browser's extensions page, find AdOff, and click "Remove". Then you can delete the folder from your computer.
install.faq.a7: AdOff supports all Chromium browsers (Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera, Vivaldi, Arc) with 100% feature compatibility, Firefox with 95%, and Safari 16.4+ on macOS Ventura+ with 95% (requires Xcode). On Android, use Kiwi Browser or Firefox. iOS support coming soon.
install.faq.a8: On Android, install Kiwi Browser (free from Play Store) which supports Chrome extensions. On iOS, browser extensions are not yet supported. We're working on it.
install.faq.q1: Do I have to keep the folder on my computer?
install.faq.q2: Is it safe to enable Developer Mode?
install.faq.q3: The browser says "Disable developer extensions" - what do I do?
install.faq.q5: Does it work on all websites?
install.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
install.firefox.note.desc: Make sure you've downloaded the Firefox version (adoff-firefox.zip), not the Chromium one.
install.firefox.note.title: Firefox version
install.firefox.s1.desc: Find adoff-firefox.zip in Downloads and extract it.
install.firefox.s1.title: Extract the ZIP file
install.firefox.s2.desc: Type in the address bar: about:debugging#/runtime/this-firefox and press Enter.
install.firefox.s2.title: Open Firefox Debug page
install.firefox.s3.desc:
Click Load Temporary Add-on

Select the manifest.json file in the extracted folder.
⚠ On Firefox, manually loaded extensions are temporary. They disappear when you close Firefox and you have to reload them each time. We're working on publishing to Firefox Add-ons Store for permanent installation.
install.firefox.s3.title: Load temporary add-on
install.firefox.s3.warn: On Firefox, manually loaded extensions are temporary. They disappear when you close Firefox and you have to reload them each time. We're working on publishing to Firefox Add-ons Store for permanent installation.
install.opera.s1.desc:
Opera uses the Chromium engine. Follow the same steps:

1. Extract the ZIP
2. Go to opera://extensions
3. Enable Developer Mode (top right)
4. Load unpacked extension
5. Select the folder
💡 Opera might show a request for third-party extensions. Click Allow to proceed.
install.opera.s1.title: Same procedure as Chrome
install.safari.note.desc: Safari is stricter than other browsers. It requires Xcode (Apple's free app) to install extensions. The procedure takes about 30 minutes the first time. Requires macOS Ventura 13+, Safari 16.4+. Don't worry if you've never opened Terminal, I'll guide you step by step.
install.safari.note.title: Before you start
install.safari.permanent.desc: Unsigned extensions disable when Safari restarts. To use AdOff permanently without repeating step 5 every time, you have two options: (1) Join Apple Developer Program ($99/year) and sign the extension yourself, or (2) Wait for Mac App Store release. Coming soon, one-click installation.
install.safari.permanent.title: Make the installation permanent
install.safari.s1.desc:
1.1 Open Finder (smiley icon in the Dock at the bottom).
1.2 In the left sidebar, click Downloads.
1.3 Find the file adoff-safari.zip (the one you just downloaded).
1.4 Double-click the file. macOS extracts it automatically and creates an adoff-safari folder next to the ZIP.
1.5 Don't move or rename this folder. Leave it in Downloads.
install.safari.s1.title: Extract the ZIP file
install.safari.s2.desc:
2.1 Open Mac App Store (blue "A" icon in the Dock or Launchpad).
2.2 In the search bar at top left, type Xcode and press Return.
2.3 Click Download or Install on the Xcode entry (Apple icon, by Apple).
2.4 Sign in with your Apple ID if requested (same as App Store).
2.5 Wait for download. Xcode is large (~10 GB), might take 20-60 minutes.
2.6 When ready, open Xcode at least once: click the icon in Launchpad or Applications.
2.7 A window appears with license terms. Click Agree.
2.8 Wait for Xcode to finish initial setup (1-2 minutes), then close it (Cmd+Q).
💡 If your Mac doesn't have enough space, free at least 15 GB before starting.
install.safari.s2.tip: If your Mac doesn't have enough space, free at least 15 GB before starting.
install.safari.s2.title: Install Xcode (free, ~10 GB)
install.safari.s3.desc:
3.1 Press Cmd + Space together. A search bar opens (Spotlight) at top.
3.2 Type Terminal and press Return. A white/black window opens (Terminal, nothing scary, it's a normal Mac program).
3.3 Copy this command exactly (click the gray box to select, then Cmd+C):
xcrun safari-web-extension-converter ~/Downloads/adoff-safari
3.4 Click in the Terminal window, paste with Cmd+V, then press Return.
3.5 Terminal asks "Continue?". Type y and press Return.
3.6 Wait 30-60 seconds. Xcode opens automatically with an "AdOff" project.
3.7 In Xcode, click the ▶ Play button at top left (or Cmd+R).
3.8 Compilation: wait 1-3 minutes. A small "AdOff" window might open. You can close it (extension is already installed).
⚠ If you get "permission denied" or "command not found": open Xcode, Preferences, Locations, Command Line Tools, and select the newest version. Then retry step 3.4.
install.safari.s3.title: Open Terminal and run command
install.safari.s3.warn: If you get "permission denied" or "command not found": open Xcode, Preferences, Locations, Command Line Tools, and select the newest version. Then retry step 3.4.
install.safari.s4.desc:
4.1 Open Safari (compass icon in the Dock).
4.2 In the menu bar at top, click Safari → Preferences (or Cmd+,).
4.3 A window opens with tabs at top. Click Advanced (last one, gear icon).
4.4 At the bottom, find Show web developer features (or "Show Developer menu" on older versions).
4.5 Check the box. A new Developer menu appears in Safari's menu bar.
4.6 Close Preferences.
install.safari.s4.title: Enable Developer menu in Safari
install.safari.s5.desc:
5.1 In Safari's menu bar, click the new Developer menu.
5.2 Scroll the menu and click Allow Unsigned Extensions.
5.3 Safari asks for your Mac password (the one you use to log in). Type it and press Return.
5.4 The option is now active (you can verify: reopen Developer menu, "Allow Unsigned Extensions" has a checkmark).
⚠ Important: this option disables automatically every time you restart Safari. You must re-enable it (step 5.1-5.3) every system restart.
install.safari.s5.title: Allow unsigned extensions
install.safari.s5.warn: Important: this option disables automatically every time you restart Safari. You must re-enable it (step 5.1-5.3) every system restart.
install.safari.s6.desc:
6.1 Reopen Safari Preferences: Safari → Preferences (or Cmd+,).
6.2 Click the Extensions tab (puzzle icon).
6.3 In the left list, you should see AdOff. Check the box next to it.
6.4 A popup asks for site access permissions. Click Allow always on all websites (or "Allow on all websites").
6.5 Close Preferences. Visit any site with ads (news, video platform, forum). Ads are blocked.
6.6 The AdOff icon (an "A" with red overlay) appears automatically in Safari's toolbar at top right. Click it to open the popup with controls.
✅ Done. AdOff is active. You get 30 free Pro trial days. The icon shows the countdown.
install.safari.s6.success: Done. AdOff is active. You get 30 free Pro trial days. The icon shows the countdown.
install.safari.s6.title: Enable AdOff
install.steps.title: Step 2: Install

privacy.summary: In brief: AdOff does not collect personal browsing data. It does not track you. It does not sell data to anyone. The only communication with our servers is Pro license validation, and even there we share the bare minimum. The FREE version works without any registration or account. No data is collected from free users beyond what is stored locally on the device.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
problem.label: The problem
problem.stat1.desc: Five, ten, fifteen seconds of forced waiting before every video. "Skip ad" button that appears when it wants. Multiplied by every clip you open, every day. Time you can't get back.
problem.stat1.title: Countdown on every video
problem.stat2.desc: A single page loads an average of 847 scripts that record what you watch, how long you stay, where you click. RAM balloons. Battery drains. Browser slows. Your profile is sold.
problem.stat2.title: Trackers per page
problem.stat3.desc: Nearly a quarter of every MB you download is an ad request. You pay for connection, bandwidth, and battery to be bombarded with commercial messages you didn't ask for.
problem.stat3.title: Of your bandwidth on ads
problem.text: As websites become increasingly aggressive at tracking and blocking you, standard solutions fail. AdOff introduces a new protection standard: it blocks ads and invasive scripts while remaining completely invisible to detection systems.
problem.title: The game of Cat and Mouse is over.

Now.
sl.cta.urgency: Every minute you hesitate, trackers collect data on you.
sl.faq.a6: Yes. AdOff is available for Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Opera and Brave (Safari coming soon). Your Pro license works on all your personal devices: just enter the same license key in each install. Counters stay local to each browser, for privacy.
sl.faq.q6: Can I use AdOff on multiple browsers?
sl.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
sl.feat.title:
Six technologies. One goal:
clean web.
sl.guarantee.1: 30 free Pro days, completely free. No credit card, no auto-renewal. When they expire, if you do nothing, you return to Free.
sl.guarantee.2: Full refund within 30 days of first payment. No questions, no red tape. Write support, refund starts within 24 hours.
sl.guarantee.3: Free plan forever, with no time limit. Network blocking and visual filters stay active even without a subscription. AdOff never stops working.
sl.guarantee.label: Guarantee
sl.guarantee.sub: Three concrete reasons to try AdOff Pro today with no commitment.
sl.guarantee.title: Zero risk. Three guarantees.
sl.hero.headline:
Real-speed web.
No ads, not even in videos.
sl.problem.sub: Countdown on every video. Banners everywhere. Trackers that bloat RAM. Anti-adblock walls even when you have a blocker. That's an average day on the web.
sl.problem.title:
The web became a minefield.
Does that seem normal to you?
sl.problem.twist.text:
You install an ad blocker, the logical solution. The site responds with a window: "Disable your ad blocker to continue reading." You're trapped. You suffer the ads, or you lose access to the content.

Until now.
sl.problem.twist.title: And the final blow: standard blockers get detected.
sl.solution.bullet1: Network blocking and visual filters on any website
sl.solution.bullet2: Video ads neutralized at the source on streaming platforms (Pro)
sl.solution.bullet3: Stealth anti-detection: sites don't know it exists (Pro)
sl.solution.cta: Add AdOff to Chrome, it's free →
sl.solution.text1: AdOff is a modern Chrome extension that blocks ads, pop-ups, trackers, and cookie banners before they load. Works asynchronously: zero page blocking, zero slowdowns. Pro adds Stealth technology to mask every trace, so anti-adblock systems can't detect it.
sl.solution.text2: 138 network blocking rules. Visual CSS filters. Pro: video ad blocking at the source on streaming platforms. Zero Log Policy: no data on your browsing ever leaves your device. Ultra-lightweight. Asynchronous. Privacy-first by design.
sl.solution.title: An invisible filter that works in the background. While you browse.
sl.stealth.callout: The result: no site shows you "disable your ad blocker" anymore. Not even news sites with the most aggressive anti-adblock systems.
sl.stealth.how1.desc: Simulates standard ad variables. Site "sees" ads as loaded, even though they're not.
sl.stealth.how1.title: Variable Spoofing
sl.stealth.how2.desc: Intercepts fetch/XHR requests to detection servers. Responds with convincing fake data.
sl.stealth.how2.title: Fetch Interception
sl.stealth.how3.desc: Bait elements used to detect ad blockers are recognized and spoofed.
sl.stealth.how3.title: Bait Spoofing
sl.stealth.how4.desc: Operates in the page's privileged context. Undetectable by standard extension isolation.
sl.stealth.how4.title: MAIN World Execution
sl.stealth.how5.desc: Replaces video ad SDK with a neutral stub. Player gets "no ads available".
sl.stealth.how5.title: IMA SDK Neutralization
sl.stealth.how6.desc: Masks extension traces in the DOM and browser APIs. Zero detectable signatures.
sl.stealth.how6.title: Anti-Fingerprinting
sl.stealth.label: Stealth Mode
sl.stealth.sub: The most aggressive sites use six different techniques to identify an ad blocker: JavaScript variables, fetches to ad servers, bait elements in the DOM, mutation observer, XHR interception, fingerprinting. Stealth Mode fools them all.
sl.stealth.title:
Other blockers get detected.
AdOff doesn't.
sl.test.label: Verified reviews
sl.test.title: Those who've installed it don't go back
sl.test1.name: Marco R.
sl.test1.quote: After installing, the "disable your ad blocker" message disappeared. On every site. Even on news sites with the most aggressive anti-adblock. And the browser feels snappier. I'm amazed.
sl.test2.name: Sara M.
sl.test2.quote: I work online eight hours a day. The time I save not watching video ads is measurable: about 90 minutes a week, which I now dedicate to my work. The annual plan paid for itself in two days.
sl.test3.name: Luca T.
sl.test3.quote: I've tried all the famous blockers. All detected by the news sites I read every day. With AdOff, silence: no pop-ups, no warnings. My fifteen-year-old installed it and now recommends it to his friends.
sl.test4.name: Elena V.
sl.test4.quote: I'm a journalist and spend hours on news sites. Before, it was warfare: banners everywhere, paywalls, "disable your ad blocker" warnings on every article. With Stealth Mode it all disappeared. I read in peace, like fifteen years ago.
sl.test5.name: Thomas K.
sl.test5.quote: I checked the extension size twice because I didn't believe it. My old blocker weighed six megabytes and Chrome became a snail. With AdOff I feel no difference: just that ads are gone.
sl.test6.name: Andrea P.
sl.test6.quote: I manage a small e-commerce and research competitors all day. Before, I spent half my time closing pop-ups and cookie banners. With AdOff they disappear on load. The Lifetime plan was the best investment of the year.
sl.works.label: Compatibility
sl.works.sub: AdOff blocks ads on every site you visit. Here are just a few of the places where it shines.
sl.works.title: Works everywhere you browse
support.browser.label: Browser info (auto-detected)

support.desc.label: Description
support.desc.ph:
Describe the issue in detail. Include:
- What you expected to happen
- What actually happened
- The website URL where it occurs
- Browser version (chrome://version)
support.email.label: Email *
support.email.note: Must be the email used to purchase the license
support.license.label: License key
support.license.note: Optional, for Pro users only. Leave blank if using Free.
support.name.label: Name
support.pri.label: Priority
support.quick.title: Quick solutions
support.quick1.desc: Try disabling and re-enabling AdOff. If the issue persists, the site might use a new anti-adblock. Report it as a bug.
support.quick1.title: Extension not working on a site?
support.quick2.desc: Check you've copied the full key, including "ADOFF-". Go to Options > License. If still not working, you might have reached your 3-device limit.
support.quick2.title: License key not accepted?
support.quick3.desc: AdOff skips ads automatically when the "Skip" button appears. Pre-roll ads stay visible for 5-15 seconds before being skipped. This is normal behavior.
support.quick3.title: Ads in videos still showing?
support.quick4.desc: We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. Select "Refund" above and include your license key. Processed within 48 hours.
support.quick4.title: Want a refund?
support.subject.label: Subject
support.subtitle: We respond within 24 hours. Check the FAQ first, you might find the answer.
support.title: Support
terms.refund.box: 30-day money-back guarantee: If you are not satisfied with your Pro license for any reason, contact us via our support page within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. No questions asked.
terms.summary.body: Free tier is available to everyone with no account and zero server communication. Pro licenses allow up to 3 devices. An optional account (Google, email, or license key) lets you manage devices at adoff.app/account. You get a 30-day free trial (all Pro features, no credit card) and a 30-day money-back guarantee. Lifetime licenses are valid forever for the original purchaser.
terms.summary.head: Key Points at a Glance:
terms.title: Terms of Service
trust.guarantee.desc: 30 days to try AdOff Pro. If you're not satisfied, contact us via our support page within 30 days of purchase for a full 100% refund. No questions. No hassle. Your money is safe.
trust.guarantee.title: Satisfied or refunded
trust.label: Your security
trust.note: Your payment data is handled exclusively by Stripe (PCI DSS Level 1 certified). AdOff never has access to card numbers. Your email is used only to send you your license.
trust.private.desc: We don't track your browsing. We don't sell your data. Ever. Your email is only for your license. No data is shared with third parties. GDPR compliant.
trust.private.title: Zero data collection
trust.secure.desc: Payments are handled by Stripe, the global leader in online payments. We never save your card data. Every transaction is protected by 256-bit SSL encryption.
trust.secure.title: 100% secure payment
trust.sub: We're an ad blocker. Your privacy is our business.
trust.title: Your data is safe. Guaranteed.
withdrawal.cancel.box: In compliance with Directive (EU) 2023/2673, cancellation is designed to be as simple as contacting us by email. No dark patterns, no obstacles, no retention flows.
withdrawal.further.box: We go further: AdOff offers a 30-day money-back guarantee, more than double the EU legal minimum. You have 30 days from purchase to request a full refund, no questions asked.
withdrawal.s2: 2. Exception for Digital Content and Why It Does Not Apply to Paid Purchases
withdrawal.s3: 3. How to Exercise Your Right of Withdrawal
withdrawal.summary.body: In plain language: If you purchased AdOff Pro and changed your mind, you can get a full refund within 30 days of purchase, no questions asked. EU law gives you at least 14 days; we give you 30. Contact us via our support page.
withdrawal.title: Right of Withdrawal
uninstall.domain_label: On which site did you still see ads?
uninstall.consent_text: Yes, send this address to help us improve. No other data is collected. You can request deletion at any time.
home.hero.title: Ads gone. The web is yours again.
home.hero.sub: Block ads, trackers, and popups on every site. Nothing to configure: install AdOff and browse clean, fast, and distraction-free.
home.ba.label: Before and after
home.ba.title: The same site. Two different worlds.
home.ba.sub: On the left, the web as it is today: banners, popups, video ads, trackers. On the right, the same site with AdOff: clean and lightweight.
home.ba.caption: 8 ads · 15 trackers · 3.2s loading time become 0 ads · 0 trackers · 0.8s.
home.wall.badge: Disable your ad blocker to continue
home.wall.title: No more "Disable your ad blocker" walls.
home.wall.text: With Pro, stealth tech makes AdOff invisible to anti-adblock systems. Those walls that block your page? They simply don't show up anymore.
home.why.label: Why AdOff
home.why.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
home.b1.d: Pages load faster: without the weight of ads and trackers, you save time and data.
home.b2.d: No trackers following you online. Zero data collected, zero data sold.
home.b3.d: Read, watch, and browse without popups, banners, or interruptions.
home.b4.d: With Pro, ads before and during videos on streaming platforms disappear.
home.b5.d: Works even where other ad blockers get detected and blocked.
home.b6.d: Install it and it works. No account, no configuration, no manual.
home.platforms: Works on Chrome · Firefox · Edge · Opera · Brave — Safari coming soon

home.os.title: Open source. Verifiable by anyone.
home.os.sub: No black box. Every line of AdOff is public on GitHub: you can see exactly what it does — and what it doesn't do — with your data.

home.pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade to Pro if you want more.

home.guar.g2.d: Changed your mind? We refund you, no questions asked.
home.guar.g3.d: The monthly plan cancels at any moment, in one click.
home.faq.label: Frequently asked questions
home.faq.title: Got questions? We've got answers.
home.faq.a1: AdOff blocks requests to ad servers and hides ad elements on the page. Install it and it works immediately, no configuration needed.
home.faq.q2: Do I need to configure anything?
home.faq.a2: No. Install AdOff and protection is already active. No account, no settings to touch.
home.faq.q3: Does it work on videos too?
home.faq.a3: Yes, with Pro. AdOff neutralizes video ads on major streaming platforms using the IMA standard.
home.faq.q4: What about "Disable your ad blocker" walls?
home.faq.a4: Pro's stealth tech makes AdOff invisible to anti-adblock systems, so you keep browsing without seeing those walls.
home.faq.a5: No. AdOff is open source, doesn't collect or sell personal data, and doesn't track your browsing.
home.faq.a6: Basic protection is free. Pro starts at €2.99/month or €19.99/year, with 15 days free trial. Premium adds a VPN for €4.99/month.
home.faq.q7: Which browsers does it work on?
home.faq.a7: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Opera, and Brave. Safari coming soon.
home.faq.a8: Yes. The monthly plan cancels at any moment and there's a refund within 30 days, no questions asked.
home.final.title: Ready to browse without ads?
home.final.sub: Install AdOff in 30 seconds. No account, no card.
home.final.note: Open source · Works instantly · 15 days of Pro included

pricing.faq.label: FAQ
pricing.faq.title: Questions? We answer.
pricing.faq.cancel.a: Yes. The monthly plan can be cancelled at any time without penalties. You keep using the service until the end of the paid period. No strings attached.
pricing.faq.trial.a: The 15-day Pro trial activates automatically on first install. No credit card required. After the trial, choose whether to upgrade to Pro or stay with Free. The trial is available once per device.
pricing.faq.data.q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
pricing.faq.data.a: Your data stays only on your device. AdOff doesn't collect personal data to sell or share. Cancelling means losing access to Pro/Premium but your local data stays yours.
pricing.faq.upgrade.q: Can I switch from Free to Pro anytime?
pricing.faq.upgrade.a: Yes, you can upgrade to Pro or Premium anytime directly from the extension or the site. The trial is available once per device.
pricing.cta.title: Ready to browse ad-free?
pricing.cta.sub: Install AdOff in 30 seconds. No credit card required.
pricing.cta.note: Open source · No account · Works immediately
